name: operator
description: Agent Operator Kit for Codex: an operator cockpit for project-local feature sessions, agent lanes, task packets, memory, feedback intake, planning, design review, UX audits, journeys, and incubation.

interface.shortDescription: Feature sessions and agent lanes · v0.4.6
interface.longDescription:
Version 0.4.6. Operator is the Codex plugin for Agent Operator Kit: a cockpit for real projects. It detects whether the current workspace is the kit source, an installed project, a stale install, or a new repo; installs, migrates, or updates the project-local Operator Kit files as needed; then opens the feature-session cockpit.

Use it to coordinate multiple feature chats, isolated worktrees, reusable lane roles, task packets, handoffs, memory, roadmap items, feedback intake, planning, design review, UX audits, journeys, and incubation. The source of truth stays explicit and project-local: operator.config.env, scripts/operator-*.sh, OPERATOR_DIR, feature sessions, lanes, memory, roadmap, and handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Show active feature sessions and conflicts
Create a feature session and bind this chat
Update this project to the latest Operator Kit
